titleStmt.title: SII 38.289: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 289. (A.R. No. 289 of 1912.) ŚIVANKŪḌAL, KANCHIPURAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On a pillar lying in the precints of the Śivakoḻunḍīśvara temple.

summary.p: Records that the sabhaiyār of Śivaṉkūḍal in Nīrvēḷūr-nāḍu in Ūṟṟukkāṭṭukkōṭṭam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, received gold in the name of Uḍaiyāṉ Ādittaṉ Paṟpanāvaṉ of Śivaṉkūḍal, (who is described as) an official of ghaṭika (ghaṭika-madhyasthan) and sold one and half vēli and two and half mā of land in three pieces, for providing various food offerings during the three sandhis, to the god, Ūruḍaiya Mahādēva of Śivaṉkūḍal. It is also stated that the sabhā also freed the land from taxes. The inscription further mentions that the previous offerings of two nāḻi of food was found inadequate and to increase the food offerings to four nāḻi during the three sandhis the present land grant was made. It is also stated that the sabhaiyār also agreed to burn eight twilight (sandhis) lamps.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripanmarāṉa śrīrājentracoḻadevaṟku yā
ṇṭu 3 Āvatu cayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu Ūṟṟukkāṭ
ṭukkoṭṭattu nirveḷurnāṭṭuc civakūṭal sabhaiyom I
vvūr Ūruṭaiya mātevaṟku muṉpu Irunāḻit tiruvamirtā
taṉamaiyil Ivvirunāḻit tiruvamitoṭumeṟṟi muṉṟu sandhi
yum nāṉāḻit tiruvamirtum porikkaṟi Uḷḷiṭṭuk kaṟiyamutu Ira
ṇṭum poḻtu nāḻittayiramirtum neyyamurtum veṟuṅkāy

nālum veṟṟilai Eṭṭum Aṭaikkāyamurtum Ipparicu cantrāti
ttavaṟ ceyvatāka Ivvūrkkaṭikai matdhyastaṉ (ci)civakūṭaluṭai
yāṉ Ātittaṉ paṟpaṉāvaṉ perāl poṉkoṇṭu Ivvūr
brāhmātārāya putteri kiḻkkamalanārāyaṇa tūmpiṉ vaḻi Ū
r mañcikkamāyk kiṭanta Ottimeṭu taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam Araiye
Oru mākāṇiyum Ittūmpiṉ vaḻi Erikkiḻ kālvaḻi Otti me
ṭu taṭi Iraṇṭum nilam mukkāle Iraṇṭu mākkaāṇi Arai
kkāṇiyum Ivveri ciruṭaikkaḻalāṉ tūmpiṉ vaḻi
tevarpokattiṉ melaikkuṇṭilu māvum Āka ni
lam Oṉṟareye Irumāvarai nilamum Ittevaṟ
ku muṉṟu san=tiyum tiruvamirtum neymirtum kaṟiyamu
rtu Aṭaikkāyamirtum cantrātittavaṟ ceyvatāka poṉ koṇṭu I
nnilam cantrātittavaṟ Iṟaiyiḻiccuk kuṭuttom sabhaiyom
Innivedyaṅkoṇṭu muṉṟucan=tiyu (mu)muṉṟu can=tiviḷakkum ḍa
muṉpu can=ti viḷakku Añcum Āka Ipparicu can=ti Erikka kaṭavār
kaḷākavum Ipparicupaṇittom sabhaiyom §
Digital edition of SII 38.289 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
